cmd: for token in $(grep 'TOKEN' /root/Iryna_Karmazina/.env | cut -d= -f2); do result=$(curl -s "https://api.telegram.org/bot$token/getMe"); name=$(echo $result | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d['result']['first_name'], '@'+d['result']['username'])" 2>/dev/null); echo "Bot: $name"; done
